falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by at least 5%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong bullish trend contradicting the pattern's implied bearish exhaustion, invalidating the 'UNKNOWN' verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume surges to 200% above the 30-day average volume
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge would signal extreme market participation, directly opposing the blowoff score's implication of low-volume consolidation.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Relative Strength Index (RSI) crosses above 70 and stays there for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This overbought condition would refute the pattern's suggestion of a potential bottom, proving the HOLD signal incorrect.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
